description_long: This is a polygonal, wooden cup with a rugged, hand-crafted appearance, featuring a dark, metallic handle attached to one side. The body of the cup is constructed from wooden staves, reinforced by two wide, black metal bands encircling its upper and lower sections. On the front, a prominent green biohazard symbol within a triangle is displayed, giving the cup a distinctive, industrial or hazardous look. The handle is angular and robust, made from a dark metal, and is securely fastened to the cup's side. The interior appears hollow and unfinished, consistent with the rough-hewn exterior. The overall design suggests a utilitarian object, possibly used in a themed urban or post-apocalyptic setting.
description: A rugged wooden cup with black metal bands, a sturdy angular handle, and a green biohazard symbol on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green biohazard symbol and the angular black handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible symbol or decoration.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and the biohazard symbol partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no handle or symbol visible, only the wooden and metal banded surface.
